title: rubus × multibracteatus
intro: Rubus × multibracteatus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties due to the presence of anthocyanins and other polyphenols. The health benefits of Rubus × multibracteatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × multibracteatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
